all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And I will bring you in unto the land, concerning the which I did swear to give it to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob; and I will give it you for an heritage: I am the Lord.
Exodus 6:8
Quote of the Day
"Forsake not your own mercy. Look to … the living Christ, He who rose from His three-day grave having conquered all—for you."
Elder Matthew S. Holland | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
